name: Lumina Browser Configuration
description: Browser preferences and configuration for the Lumina project

preferred_browser.name: Neo
preferred_browser.notes: Neo browser is the preferred browser for all Lumina project operations. Installed at D:\Program Files\Neo

browser_preferences.notes: Chrome should not be used. Use Neo browser instead.

user_agents.default: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Neo/1.0 Safari/537.36
user_agents.notes: User agent string for Neo browser

mcp_browser_extension.notes: MCP browser extension should use Neo browser

roo_code.notes: Roo Code browser tool should use Neo

protected_processes.notes: Neo browser processes should be protected. Chrome processes should be excluded.

_metadata.notes: This configuration ensures Neo browser is used instead of Chrome for all Lumina project operations
